# Brainstormer Consulting

> AI consulting firm — discovery interviews, PRDs, vertical-slice plans,
> and dependency-ordered GitHub issues.

## Company

- [Company Manifest](COMPANY.md): Root package — mission, goals, operating principles

## Agents

- [CEO / Engagement Lead](agents/ceo/AGENTS.md): Orchestrates full engagement pipeline, applies MVP lens at every phase gate
- [Discovery Analyst](agents/discovery-analyst/AGENTS.md): Structured interviews covering problem, users, business model, scale, and domain concerns
- [Product Architect](agents/product-architect/AGENTS.md): PRD creation and vertical-slice planning
- [Delivery Manager](agents/delivery-manager/AGENTS.md): Dependency-ordered GitHub issue creation with AFK/HITL classification
- [Lead Engineer](agents/lead-engineer/AGENTS.md): TDD implementation and code shipping

## Team

- [Consulting](teams/consulting/TEAM.md): Full-service engagement team — all 5 agents

## Skills (from auditmos/brainstormer)

- [Ask](https://github.com/auditmos/brainstormer/blob/main/skills/ask/SKILL.md): Discovery interview
- [Blueprint](https://github.com/auditmos/brainstormer/blob/main/skills/blueprint/SKILL.md): PRD creation
- [Carve](https://github.com/auditmos/brainstormer/blob/main/skills/carve/SKILL.md): PRD to vertical-slice plan
- [Dispatch](https://github.com/auditmos/brainstormer/blob/main/skills/dispatch/SKILL.md): PRD to GitHub issues
- [TDD](https://github.com/auditmos/brainstormer/blob/main/skills/tdd/SKILL.md): Test-driven development
- [Ship](https://github.com/auditmos/brainstormer/blob/main/skills/ship/SKILL.md): Lint, commit, push
- [Lean](https://github.com/auditmos/brainstormer/blob/main/skills/lean/SKILL.md): MVP advisor
- [Brainstorm](https://github.com/auditmos/brainstormer/blob/main/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md): Full workflow orchestration

## Workflow

Pipeline: Ask -> Blueprint -> Carve -> Dispatch -> TDD. Use Lean at any point.
